name: Proline Bentonite Clumping Cat Litter Baby Powder 10 L
shortDescription: Proline Bentonite Cat Litter (Baby Powder Scented) 10 L for happy and clean cats. Instantly lumps, thereby preventing bacteria and odour from taking over your cat's litter box.
description: Proline Bentonite Cat Litter (Baby Powder Scented) 10 L for happy and clean cats. Instantly lumps, thereby preventing bacteria and odour from taking over your cat's litter box. Absorbent Feature: Proline cat litter absorbs liquid with its excellent clumping instantly. This feature prevents the growth of any bacteria that could harm you and your cat. Anti-odour effect: Ina addition to preventing the spread of bad odour in the environment, proline cat litter gives a pleasant smell to the environment when it comes into contact with liquid. How to use: - Place the litter box in a place where your cat can easily reach it and where it will not be disturbed while using it. - Pour 7-8 cm thick sand into the cat toilet bowl to cover the entire floor. - Remove clumped particles, pieces of feces and coarse dirt every day with a suitable shovel. - If the amount of sand is reduced, complete it by adding sand. - If you have more than one cat, the process of changing the litter will be shorter. - Be sure to wash your hands with soap after any contact with used cat litter.
